testcase.name: test_tc2_checkbox_home_icon_select_and_message_verify

failure.message:
AssertionError: Healing failed for home_checkbox_icon: {'status': 'failed', 'correlation_id': '49dd89568d3d460096eea3d2c7520ca6', 'locator_spec': None, 'metadata': None, 'strategy_id': None, 'trace': [{'stage': 'rag', 'strategy_id': 'rag_suggest', 'status': 'fail', 'candidate_count': 1, 'selected_locator': {'kind': 'role', 'value': 'checkbox', 'options': {'name': 'Home', 'exact': True}, 'scope': None}, 'score': 0.95, 'validation': {'ok': False, 'reason_codes': ['no_match'], 'matched_count': 0, 'chosen_index': None, 'score': None, 'details': {}}, 'duration_ms': 31.039200024679303, 'details': {'source': 'llm', 'rag_pass': 'light', 'deep_graph': True, 'llm_reason': "There is a label element with role=checkbox and visible text 'Home', which is the preferred proxy for a custom checkbox. This matches the field type and visible label, and is likely the accessible control.", 'llm_confidence': 0.95, 'llm_red_flags': ['outside_candidate_universe'], 'grounded_in_context': False}}, {'stage': 'rag', 'strategy_id': 'rag_suggest', 'status': 'fail', 'candidate_count': 1, 'selected_locator': {'kind': 'css', 'value': '[id="tree-node-home"]', 'options': {}, 'scope': None}, 'score': 0.85, 'validation': {'ok': False, 'reason_codes': ['not_visible'], 'matched_count': 1, 'chosen_index': None, 'score': None, 'details': {}}, 'duration_ms': 103.92580000916496, 'details': {'source': 'llm', 'rag_pass': 'light', 'deep_graph': True, 'llm_reason': "There is a unique input element with id 'tree-node-home' and type 'checkbox', matching the field type and label. This is a stable and unique selector.", 'llm_confidence': 0.85, 'grounded_in_context': True, 'retry_attempts': 1, 'attempts_used': 2}}, {'stage': 'rag', 'strategy_id': 'rag_summary', 'status': 'fail', 'candidate_count': 2, 'selected_locator': None, 'score': None, 'validation': None, 'duration_ms': None, 'details': {'reason': 'no_valid_candidate'}}, {'stage': 'rag', 'strategy_id': 'rag_suggest', 'status': 'fail', 'candidate_count': 1, 'selected_locator': {'kind': 'role', 'value': 'checkbox', 'options': {'name': 'Home', 'exact': True}, 'scope': None}, 'score': 0.95, 'validation': {'ok': False, 'reason_codes': ['no_match'], 'matched_count': 0, 'chosen_index': None, 'score': None, 'details': {}}, 'duration_ms': 13.21579999057576, 'details': {'source': 'llm', 'rag_pass': 'deep_1', 'deep_graph': True, 'llm_reason': "There is a label element with role=checkbox and visible text 'Home', which is the preferred proxy for a custom checkbox. This matches the field type and visible label, and is unique in the DOM context.", 'llm_confidence': 0.95, 'llm_red_flags': ['outside_candidate_universe'], 'grounded_in_context': False}}, {'stage': 'rag', 'strategy_id': 'rag_suggest', 'status': 'fail', 'candidate_count': 1, 'selected_locator': {'kind': 'css', 'value': '[id="tree-node-home"]', 'options': {}, 'scope': None}, 'score': 0.85, 'validation': {'ok': False, 'reason_codes': ['not_visible'], 'matched_count': 1, 'chosen_index': None, 'score': None, 'details': {}}, 'duration_ms': 84.4601999851875, 'details': {'source': 'llm', 'rag_pass': 'deep_1', 'deep_graph': True, 'llm_reason': "The input with id='tree-node-home' and type='checkbox' is unique and matches the field type, but is less preferred than the visible label/wrapper for custom controls.", 'llm_confidence': 0.85, 'grounded_in_context': True, 'retry_attempts': 1, 'attempts_used': 2}}, {'stage': 'rag', 'strategy_id': 'rag_summary', 'status': 'fail', 'candidate_count': 2, 'selected_locator': None, 'score': None, 'validation': None, 'duration_ms': None, 'details': {'reason': 'no_valid_candidate'}}], 'error': 'All healing stages failed to produce a valid locator.'} assert 'failed' == 'success'
- success + failed

testcase.name: test_tc4_raw_fallback_xpath_fails_without_healer

failure.message: Failed: Intentional failure: raw fallback xpath did not resolve any element: //xh-never-match[@id='raw_xpath_negative-broken']
